description: Address issues found in the review: SW caches error responses, FeelingLucky silent failure, RecentlyViewed getSnapshot performance, PageTransition remount, KeyboardShortcutsOverlay z-index collision.
steps: Fix public/sw.js: add response.ok check before caching responses in all fetch handlers. Add a max entries limit (50) for API cache with eviction of oldest entries.
Fix app/components/FeelingLucky.tsx: use the toast system (useToast) to show an error message when fetching fails or no preview is found.
Fix app/components/RecentlyViewed.tsx: optimize getSnapshot to compare the raw localStorage string instead of double JSON.stringify.
Fix app/components/ui/PageTransition.tsx: remove key={pathname} to avoid full subtree remount on navigation. Keep CSS animation class.
Fix app/components/KeyboardShortcutsOverlay.tsx: bump z-index from z-40 to z-[45] to avoid collision with MobileBottomNav.
acceptance_criteria: Service worker only caches responses where response.ok is true
Service worker API cache has a max entry limit with eviction
FeelingLucky shows a toast error message on failure
RecentlyViewed getSnapshot avoids double JSON.stringify on every render
PageTransition does not remount the subtree on navigation
KeyboardShortcutsOverlay z-index is higher than MobileBottomNav
Build passes with zero TypeScript errors and zero lint errors
